calendar.matters:
Petition Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Off Calendar

Petition Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for Regina Fonteno, Teddy Cudjo and Yvonne de la Cruz; Heidi Li for Mitchell Jamerson; Eric Safire for Broderick Mitchell.

Mr. Cowan advised the Court that his clients will be dismissing their petition. Ms. Li stated that she wished to meet with her clients to work out the next steps in the case. She said that she would probably proceed by filing an amended petition, but would need some time to prepare it. The Court set January 25, 2016 as the deadline for filing an amended petition, and continued the matter to January 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported).

Petition Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Nov-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan, for petitioner Regina Foteno; Eric Safire, for and with Roderick Cudjo.
The Court inquired regarding the possibility of mediation. Mr. Safire responded that he had received no evidence that supported the petition. Mr. Cowan replied that he had spoken with Me. Safire requesting that the matter go to mediation, and suggested that the mediation be set 90 days out to allow for some discovery. Mr. Safire stated that he would like to have a trial date set for as soon as possible. Mr. Cowan stated that a new counsel was coming into the case, and he did not know the availability of the new counsel for the trial.
Mr. Safire stated that he had only received verifications from two of the four parties represented by Mr. Cowan, and requested an update as to receipt of the remaining verifications. Mr. Cowan replied that he had lost contact with one of them (Teddy), but that he hoped to have the verifications on file within the next 30 days.
The Court stated that he was ordering the matter to pro bono mediation, with a deadline of October 23, 2015, for the mediation to be held (order signed). The Court ordered that a status report regarding the mediation be filed by October 27, 2015. The status hearing re the petition to determine validity of purported trust and to impose constructive trust was continued to November 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Continued To Mar-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for Regina Fonteno.

Mr. Cowan requested a 30-day continuance to provide notice. The petition to determine validity of purported trust, etc. was continued to March 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clark. (Not Reported)
